title: Lead Investment Banker at BSR & Co

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at BSR & Co
jsonLd.description:
BSR & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSR & Co:
BSR & Co is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSR & Co!
